  • Jelajahi Laut Indonesia

Gaia Love, Indonesia

9.6 Exceptional
  • Nitrox available
  • Naturalist Guide
  • En-Suite bathrooms
  • Aircon Cabins
  • Non-Diver (Snorkeler) Friendly
  • Warm Water Showers
  • Massage
from $ 559 / day Check dates

“The food was perfect, the boat beautiful and comfortable, the crew lovely and competent, diving fantastic, everything wonderful. ”

Kendra P, United States

Highlights

  • Rinse tanks for camera gear and equipment
  • Nitrox available on board

The beautiful Gaia Love liveaboard offers year-round luxury dive trips in Indonesia. The 40m liveaboard caters to just 22 guests in 11 spacious cabins, featuring private en-suite bathrooms, ample storage space, individually controlled AC, and all average 20sqm in size. The upper deck cabins also have large picture windows and private outdoor balconies. The Gaia Love is spread over 4 decks and features a contemporary, modern design. Social areas include an indoor salon and dining room, outdoor lounge and dining area, spacious partially covered sun deck, and an al-fresco bar.

Read more about Gaia Love

The large dive deck is situated at the rear of the Gaia Love and is designed to take up to 28 divers, so there is plenty of room to move and get kitted up. Eleven large rinse tanks of various sizes are stationed around the dive deck for washing camera gear and dive equipment, and two 5.5m skiffs are available for easy dive site drop-off and pick-up. Itineraries visit Indonesia's best liveaboard dive sites, including Raja Ampat North & South, Komodo National Park, the Banda Sea, and the Lesser Sunda Islands.

The professional and experienced crew of the Gaia Love dive is on hand to help you create a memorable Indonesian adventure. Book online today to reserve your place.

from
$ 6,400 / person
FULL
 
 
 
 
 
 

Included: VAT, Airport Transfer, Hotel Transfer, Drinking Water, Soft drinks, Tea & Coffee, Full-Board Meal Plan (All meals), Snacks, Diving Package, Kayaks, Land Excursions, Snorkeling Guide, Stand Up Paddleboard, Cabin Towels, Complimentary Toiletries, Deck Towels.

Required Extras: Fuel Surcharge (20 USD per night), National Park Fees (35 USD per day).

Optional Extras: Dive Insurance (40-50 USD per trip), Gratuities, Visas and Fees, Local Flights, Alcoholic Beverages, Nitrox (240,000 IDR per day), Nitrox Course, Private Dive Guide, Rental Gear, Scuba Diving Courses, Laundry / Pressing Services (24,000 IDR per item), WiFi internet, Massage (560,000 IDR per activity).

Book now, pay later: You can easily place your booking online. We will then hold the spaces for you and you can confirm with a payment later.

* Extra fees are shown per person.

Pay by bank transfer or online with

Best Price Guaranteed

Boat features

  • Naturalist Guide
  • En-Suite bathrooms
  • Aircon Cabins
  • Non-Diver (Snorkeler) Friendly
  • Warm Water Showers
  • Massage
  • Air Conditioned saloon
  • Sun Deck
  • Camera Station
  • Nearly 1:1 Crew-to-Guest Ratio
  • Kayaks On-Board
  • Seaview Cabins
  • Paid Internet
  • Camera room
  • Custom built for diving
  • Charging stations
  • Indoor Saloon
  • Laundry Service
  • Library
  • Outdoor Dining
  • Audio & video entertainment
  • TV in cabins
  • Observation Deck
  • Available for Charter
  • Dedicated Local & International Crew
  • Snorkeling Equipment
  • Separate Rinse for u/w Camera
  • Leisure Deck
  • Daily housekeeping
  • Bar
  • Naturalist Guide

Food & Drinks

  • Free Wine w/Dinner
  • Fine Cuisine
  • Al Fresco Dining
  • Vegan Options
  • Vegetarian Options
  • Free Soft Drinks
  • Beer available
  • Full-board Option
  • Fine Wines Selection
  • Snacks All Day
  • Western Food
  • Local Food
  • Set Menu Dinner

If you have any specific dietary requirements whilst on-board your cruise, you can add this to your special requests on step 2 of the booking form. We advise limiting these requests to religious beliefs or food allergies.

Diving

  • Nitrox available
  • Shaded Diving Area
  • DIN Adaptors
  • Rinse Hoses
  • Dive deck
  • Tenders for diving
  • Sidemount Diving

Languages Spoken

The crew speaks English, Dutch, French, and Indonesian.

Gear Rental

Equipment is available for rent on this boat. Please provide your rental needs on the booking form. If the rental gear is not included in the price, you will need to pay for it on board the boat. Show prices

Drawings & Vessel Layouts

Cabin Types

Boat Specifications

Length
40 m
Top speed
12 knots
Cruising speed
10 knots
Engines
2 Yanmar 829 bhp
Max guests
22
Number of cabins
11
Number of bathrooms
11
Water capacity
52000 liters
Fuel capacity
66000 liters
Freshwater maker
2 Spectra 2800 Gallons per day

Boat navigation and safety

  • Radar
  • Depth Sounder
  • GPS
  • Radio VHF/DSC/SSB
  • E.P.I.R.B. Distress System
  • Emergency Rafts
  • Life Vests
  • Fire Alarm & Fire Extinguishers
  • Oxygen
  • First Aid Kits
  • Fishfinder
  • Satellite & mobile phones
  • Bilge pump alarm
  • Search light
  • Engine room CCTV

Gaia Love Reviews

  • 9.6 Exceptional
  1. Vessel
    9.9
  2. Crew
    9.7
  3. Food
    9.8
  4. Diving
    9.5
  5. Value
    9.3
  • 9.2 Superb
  • JAE WON C
  • South Korea

Fantastic

The diving was great. But the facilities were really good.

Recommended for
Boat Comfort. Crew service. Dive guides.
12 Mar, 2026
  • 10 Exceptional
  • Richard S
  • United States

The BEST scuba diving experience of my lifetime!

The entire crew on the Gaia Love were incredibly kind, attentive, and looked after every detail to ensure each guest had an extraordinary experience. This was the best scuba diving experience of my lifetime.

Recommended for
Warm hospitality and outstanding service from the entire crew, amazing accommodations, and delicious food.
26 Feb, 2020
  • 9.2 Superb
  • Jenn K
  • United States

This is what liveaboards should strive to be.

Wow. What an amazing trip. This boat is top of the line and I don’t just mean the facilities. Every piece of this trip was carefully curated by the team to be intentional, engaging, inspiring and enjoyable. The beds are incredibly comfortable, staterooms are clean and spacious with lots of storage. Service was not just exceptional, it was anticipatory: dry towels and tea waiting after dives, team taking care of all your gear including wetsuits, breakfast to order…you name it. Amanda and Jay were out of this world in providing amazing service while also balancing the importance of reef respect and conservation. Anto & Andy were like family by the end of the trip- you can tell they truly love taking care of people. There are too many good things to say about the rest of the team so all I can say is THANK YOU! I truly hope to see you all again.

Recommended for
The wonderful staff. Incredible diving. Exceptional food & service.
03 Mar, 2026
  • 10 Exceptional
  • Kendra P
  • United States

Incredible!

This trip was beyond my expectations. The food was perfect, the boat beautiful and comfortable, the crew lovely and competent, diving fantastic, everything wonderful. I hope to return again and again for any of their dives. I wish I could live on this boat!!

Recommended for
The crew, the boat and the absolutely pristine reefs.
13 Jan, 2020
  • 10 Exceptional
  • Roy W
  • United States

Unbelievable experience.

The diving was great. The service from the crew was fabulous. Every time we came back to the boat, we received a huge welcome. The staterooms are like a fancy hotel. Food and food variety was very good. Once in a life time trip and we want to go back.

Recommended for
People, Dive Sites, Food, Staff
04 Apr, 2023
  • 9.6 Exceptional
  • Aparna K
  • India

Incredible!

The trip was exceptional, the dive sites are the best we've ever been to with incredible variety (reef, muck, caves). Egoi has outstanding knowledge of the entire area and ensured that everyone had a great time.

Recommended for
The Diving. Food. Company of other guests and all the crew.
06 May, 2025
  • 10 Exceptional
  • Jia F
  • China

Very high level liveaboard

They know exactly what you want to do when you go diving!

Recommended for
Service, dive guides, food
27 Mar, 2019
  • 10 Exceptional
  • Viktor L
  • Ukraine

It was unforgettable Super)

We were impressed and pleasantly surprised by the well-designed dive vessel. In addition, the food is at the level of chic restaurants. Asian service and a very friendly team.

Recommended for
The best boat we’ve ever had. Super food. Super servise.
28 Jan, 2025
Translated from Russian
  • 10 Exceptional
  • Bengt B
  • Sweden

Amazing week in an amazing underwater-world! The crew, the boat, the service, the diving was fabulous!!!

Every dive-briefing with wonderful energetic Gerry, what a star! Giel's presentation of the menu was also an everyday highlight!

Recommended for
Great diverse diving, amazing service (including the food), super-comfortable boat!
29 Jan, 2020
  • 10 Exceptional
  • Patricia N
  • United States

Excellent service in and out of the waater

I saw a crocodile fish and a wobegone shark. The boat was very comfortable. I look forward to my next trip won the Gaia Love.

Recommended for
The crew was very helpful. The food was fabulous. The dive sites were amazing.
13 Jan, 2020

T

V
  • Victoria Mekong

  • Vista Rio
Z
  • Zafiro
23 reviews
  • 9.6 Exceptional
  • 23 Verified Reviews
  1. Vessel
    9.9
  2. Crew
    9.7
  3. Food
    9.8
  4. Diving
    9.5
  5. Value
    9.3
  • 9.2 Superb
  • JAE WON C
  • South Korea

Fantastic

The diving was great. But the facilities were really good.

Recommended for
Boat Comfort. Crew service. Dive guides.
12 Mar, 2026
  • 10 Exceptional
  • Richard S
  • United States

The BEST scuba diving experience of my lifetime!

The entire crew on the Gaia Love were incredibly kind, attentive, and looked after every detail to ensure each guest had an extraordinary experience. This was the best scuba diving experience of my lifetime.

Recommended for
Warm hospitality and outstanding service from the entire crew, amazing accommodations, and delicious food.
26 Feb, 2020
  • 9.2 Superb
  • Jenn K
  • United States

This is what liveaboards should strive to be.

Wow. What an amazing trip. This boat is top of the line and I don’t just mean the facilities. Every piece of this trip was carefully curated by the team to be intentional, engaging, inspiring and enjoyable. The beds are incredibly comfortable, staterooms are clean and spacious with lots of storage. Service was not just exceptional, it was anticipatory: dry towels and tea waiting after dives, team taking care of all your gear including wetsuits, breakfast to order…you name it. Amanda and Jay were out of this world in providing amazing service while also balancing the importance of reef respect and conservation. Anto & Andy were like family by the end of the trip- you can tell they truly love taking care of people. There are too many good things to say about the rest of the team so all I can say is THANK YOU! I truly hope to see you all again.

Recommended for
The wonderful staff. Incredible diving. Exceptional food & service.
03 Mar, 2026
  • 10 Exceptional
  • Kendra P
  • United States

Incredible!

This trip was beyond my expectations. The food was perfect, the boat beautiful and comfortable, the crew lovely and competent, diving fantastic, everything wonderful. I hope to return again and again for any of their dives. I wish I could live on this boat!!

Recommended for
The crew, the boat and the absolutely pristine reefs.
13 Jan, 2020
  • 10 Exceptional
  • Roy W
  • United States

Unbelievable experience.

The diving was great. The service from the crew was fabulous. Every time we came back to the boat, we received a huge welcome. The staterooms are like a fancy hotel. Food and food variety was very good. Once in a life time trip and we want to go back.

Recommended for
People, Dive Sites, Food, Staff
04 Apr, 2023
  • 9.6 Exceptional
  • Aparna K
  • India

Incredible!

The trip was exceptional, the dive sites are the best we've ever been to with incredible variety (reef, muck, caves). Egoi has outstanding knowledge of the entire area and ensured that everyone had a great time.

Recommended for
The Diving. Food. Company of other guests and all the crew.
06 May, 2025
  • 10 Exceptional
  • Jia F
  • China

Very high level liveaboard

They know exactly what you want to do when you go diving!

Recommended for
Service, dive guides, food
27 Mar, 2019
  • 10 Exceptional
  • Viktor L
  • Ukraine

It was unforgettable Super)

We were impressed and pleasantly surprised by the well-designed dive vessel. In addition, the food is at the level of chic restaurants. Asian service and a very friendly team.

Recommended for
The best boat we’ve ever had. Super food. Super servise.
28 Jan, 2025
Translated from Russian
  • 10 Exceptional
  • Bengt B
  • Sweden

Amazing week in an amazing underwater-world! The crew, the boat, the service, the diving was fabulous!!!

Every dive-briefing with wonderful energetic Gerry, what a star! Giel's presentation of the menu was also an everyday highlight!

Recommended for
Great diverse diving, amazing service (including the food), super-comfortable boat!
29 Jan, 2020
  • 10 Exceptional
  • Patricia N
  • United States

Excellent service in and out of the waater

I saw a crocodile fish and a wobegone shark. The boat was very comfortable. I look forward to my next trip won the Gaia Love.

Recommended for
The crew was very helpful. The food was fabulous. The dive sites were amazing.
13 Jan, 2020
from  $ 559  / day Check dates
 
Ask a question

Fill in the form below and LiveAboard’s customer service will get back to you as soon as possible.

Cabin info
Upper Deck Cabins
  • 1 Double or Twin (convertible)
  • 215.3 ft²
  • Aircon with control
  • Ensuite Bathroom
  • Max 2 guests
  • Solo traveler friendly
  • Privacy optional
6 Upper Deck cabins with individually controlled air-conditioning and ensuite bathrooms with hot water. Upper deck rooms feature ocean views and an additional private outdoor balcony.
Balcony of cabin
Walk-out balcony
Cabin is selected on the next step in your booking process. Select Itinerary
Cabin info
Lower Deck Cabins
  • 1 Double or Twin (convertible)
  • Aircon with control
  • Ensuite Bathroom
  • Max 2 guests
  • Solo traveler friendly
  • Privacy optional
5 cabins located on the lower deck with individual air-conditioning and ensuite bathrooms with hot water.
Cabin is selected on the next step in your booking process. Select Itinerary
Gear Rental

Rental Gear Prices

Equipment is available for rent on this boat. Please provide your rental needs on the booking form. If the rental gear is not included in the price, you will need to pay for it on board the boat.

  • 15L tanks 240,000 IDR per day
  • BCD 240,000 IDR per day
  • Dive Computer 192,000 IDR per day
  • Dive Light 192,000 IDR per day
  • Fins 80,000 IDR per day
  • Full Equipment (with: BCD, Dive Computer, Fins, Mask, Regulator, Wetsuit) 800,000 IDR per day
  • Mask 80,000 IDR per day
  • Nitrox tank 240,000 IDR per day
  • Regulator 240,000 IDR per day
  • Wetsuit 112,000 IDR per day
Please provide your rental needs on the booking form.
Boat features
  • Naturalist Guide
  • En-Suite bathrooms
  • Aircon Cabins
  • Non-Diver (Snorkeler) Friendly
  • Warm Water Showers
  • Massage
  • Air Conditioned saloon
  • Sun Deck
  • Camera Station
  • Nearly 1:1 Crew-to-Guest Ratio
  • Kayaks On-Board
  • Seaview Cabins
  • Paid Internet
  • Camera room
  • Custom built for diving
  • Charging stations
  • Indoor Saloon
  • Laundry Service
  • Library
  • Outdoor Dining
  • Audio & video entertainment
  • TV in cabins
  • Observation Deck
  • Available for Charter
  • Dedicated Local & International Crew
  • Snorkeling Equipment
  • Separate Rinse for u/w Camera
  • Leisure Deck
  • Daily housekeeping
  • Bar
  • Naturalist Guide
Food & Drinks
  • Free Wine w/Dinner
  • Fine Cuisine
  • Al Fresco Dining
  • Vegan Options
  • Vegetarian Options
  • Free Soft Drinks
  • Beer available
  • Full-board Option
  • Fine Wines Selection
  • Snacks All Day
  • Western Food
  • Local Food
  • Set Menu Dinner

If you have any specific dietary requirements whilst on-board your cruise, you can add this to your special requests on step 2 of the booking form. We advise limiting these requests to religious beliefs or food allergies.

Diving
  • Nitrox available
  • Shaded Diving Area
  • DIN Adaptors
  • Rinse Hoses
  • Dive deck
  • Tenders for diving
  • Sidemount Diving
Languages Spoken

The crew speaks English, Dutch, French, and Indonesian.

Boat Specifications
Length
40 m
Top speed
12 knots
Cruising speed
10 knots
Engines
2 Yanmar 829 bhp
Max guests
22
Number of cabins
11
Number of bathrooms
11
Water capacity
52000 liters
Fuel capacity
66000 liters
Freshwater maker
2 Spectra 2800 Gallons per day
Boat navigation and safety
  • Radar
  • Depth Sounder
  • GPS
  • Radio VHF/DSC/SSB
  • E.P.I.R.B. Distress System
  • Emergency Rafts
  • Life Vests
  • Fire Alarm & Fire Extinguishers
  • Oxygen
  • First Aid Kits
  • Fishfinder
  • Satellite & mobile phones
  • Bilge pump alarm
  • Search light
  • Engine room CCTV
Request a Charter booking

Please note that this inquiry is for chartering the entire boat, not for individual cabins.

We use cookies to personalize the website and our marketing. These will be set only if you accept. To find out more, read our Privacy Policy
